inverse.$description: Use for high contrast page or component backgrounds.

backdrop.$description: A semi transparent background color for backdrops (eg. dialog, side drawer).

DEFAULT.$description: The default surface background colour, used for cards, sheets, and other surfaces that sit on top of the main page background.

secondary.$description: The background color for elements with a secondary level of prominence.

tertiary.$description: The background color for elements with a tertiary level of prominence.

inverse.$description: The background color for elements displayed on an inverse (dark) surface.
